name: Goodyear Lastikleri T.A.S.
summary: Goodyear Lastikleri T.A.S. develops, produces, distributes, and sells tires and tire related products under the Goodyear, Fulda, Sava, and Debica brands worldwide. The company offers its rubber tire products for light trucks, truckers, and motorcycles; earthmoving, mining, and industrial equipment; and racing, aviation, and various other applications. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Goodyear Lastikleri T.A.S. is a subsidiary of The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company.
